summary: The v9 adapter underperformed because the answer-only DPO data optimized answer style more than agent tool policy or factual grounding.

preference_data_diagnosis.main_issue: Most pairs did not provide a clean correct-over-incorrect signal; GPT-5.4 often preferred more complete or better-supported text even when strict gold scoring favored the other answer.

trace_findings.example: SimpleQA IEEE Frank Rosenblatt Award 2010: base answered Michio Sugeno after one search; v9 continued searching/browsing and ended with Hans-Paul Schwefel.
2Wiki father of Stefan I. Nenitescu: base answered Galati; v9 answered Galati, Romania, which missed the strict expected answer.
The v9 LlamaFactory export was question-to-final-answer DPO, so tool observations and action decisions were not part of the optimized target.
Training only on 2Wiki answer preferences did not teach fixed-corpus BrowseComp retrieval, document selection, or router behavior.

next_iteration_constraints: Filter or invert preference pairs using gold correctness before DPO export.
Canonicalize chosen answers to short references only when the training split provides a safe reference.
For BrowseComp, require evidence support before replacing a model answer with the gold answer.
Evaluate one adapter under the same harness on held-out 2Wiki, SimpleQA, and BrowseComp ids.
